architecture.title: ARCHITECTURE
architecture.about:
I am a 3rd-year student at the Department of Architecture, Yeditepe University. My interest in architecture began at an early age, and I continue to develop it today in the fields of architectural design, spatial thinking, and 3D modeling. During my studies, I am learning to approach design problems from an analytical perspective and express ideas through various representational tools.

Throughout my university life, I have gained experience in teamwork, organization, and leadership by taking an active role in student representation and architecture club activities. These experiences contributed to my understanding that design production is not only an individual but a collective process.

I see architecture as a thinking practice that addresses context, space, and user relationships simultaneously. By combining a design-oriented approach with technical skills, I aim to produce high-quality architectural projects and continuously improve myself within professional practice. In this regard, I believe that an internship will be a valuable learning environment where I can closely observe the research, production, and implementation stages of architectural design.
